title: DynamicMarket
description: Dynamic supply-demand economy plugin for Paper servers with Vault integration, trends, events, and anti-stagnation balancing.
body:
# DynamicMarket

DynamicMarket turns your economy into a live supply-demand system where prices react to player trading.

## Core Features
- Dynamic buy/sell prices based on real transactions
- Stock, trends, and hot items tracking
- Random market events and inactivity decay
- Admin controls for live balancing and reload

## Requirements
- Java 17+
- Paper/Spigot/Purpur/Folia server
- Vault plugin installed and enabled
- One Vault-compatible economy plugin installed and enabled (EssentialsX Economy, CMI, etc.)

## Important
DynamicMarket is a server plugin. If Vault or an economy provider is missing, market trading will not work correctly.

## Troubleshooting
1. Run `/plugins` and confirm `Vault` and your economy plugin are loaded (green).
2. Verify your economy plugin is hooked to Vault.
3. Check server console for Vault/economy hook errors.

## Admin Commands
- `/market admin setprice [item] [price]`
- `/market admin reset [item]`
- `/market admin event [start/stop] [eventName]`
- `/market admin reload`

Support: https://buymeacoffee.com/perusi
